tasks.subject: Task 0: Column#drop_interaction + derived action key
tasks.description:
Add drop_interaction: option to Plutonium::Kanban::Column; expose reader, drop_interaction? predicate, drop_interaction_key derivation (MarkLostInteraction -> :mark_lost); raise ArgumentError on non-interaction. Verify dsl.rb passthrough.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/kanban/column.rb", "test/plutonium/kanban/column_test.rb"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec appraisal rails-8.1 ruby -Itest test/plutonium/kanban/column_test.rb", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Register drop_interaction as hidden record action
tasks.description:
At kanban compile time register each column's drop_interaction as an interactive record action flagged kanban_drop: true; exclude kanban_drop? actions from toolbars.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/definition/index_views.rb", "lib/plutonium/action/base.rb", "lib/plutonium/action/interactive/factory.rb"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec appraisal rails-8.1 ruby -Itest test/plutonium/definition/index_views_test.rb", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add GET kanban_move_form member route
tasks.description:
Add GET <member>/kanban_move_form -> kanban_actions#kanban_move_form, named. POST kanban_move unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/routing/mapper_extensions.rb"], "verifyCommand": "cd test/dummy && bin/rails routes | grep kanban_move", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: kanban_move_form GET renders interaction modal
tasks.description:
Build drop interaction as record action; render its form in remote modal; form action=kanban_move with hidden from/to_column, to_index; authorize transition; 422 when no drop_interaction.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/resource/controllers/kanban_actions.rb", "app/views/plutonium/resource/kanban_move_form.html.erb"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec appraisal rails-8.1 ruby -Itest test/integration", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: kanban_move POST — atomic interaction + on_drop + reposition
tasks.description:
Single transaction: authorize transition -> on_drop (membership) -> interaction.call (extras) -> reposition. Failure -> Rollback + 422 modal. Success -> column streams. Guards before interaction; plain columns + seed path unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/resource/controllers/kanban_actions.rb", "test/integration"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec appraisal rails-8.1 ruby -Itest test/integration", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Emit data-kanban-drop-* on drop-interaction columns
tasks.description:
Column component renders data-kanban-drop-interaction=true + data-kanban-drop-form-url-template with __ID__; plain columns render neither.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/plutonium/ui/kanban/column.rb", "lib/plutonium/resource/controllers/kanban_actions.rb", "test/integration/admin_portal/kanban_dom_contract_test.rb"], "verifyCommand": "bundle exec appraisal rails-8.1 ruby -Itest test/integration/admin_portal/kanban_dom_contract_test.rb", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Stimulus — open modal on drop (no snap-back; card never moves in DOM)
tasks.description:
On drop into drop-interaction column navigate remote-modal frame to kanban_move_form with move params; hold pending; snap back on dismiss without success; plain columns keep direct POST. yarn build.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/js/controllers/kanban_controller.js", "app/assets/plutonium.js"], "verifyCommand": "yarn build", "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.description:
Guide section w/ worked example + MarkLostInteraction; two-flow model + author contract + def mark_lost? gate; DSL table row; skill Column-options + Authorization updates; yarn docs:build.

tasks.subject: Task 8: E2E dummy drive + system test
